executives.name: Joseph Dominguez
executives.background: Joseph Dominguez is president and chief executive officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of ComEd, an Exelon company, from 2018 to 2022. Prior to that, he was executive vice president of governmental and regulatory affairs and public policy for Exelon.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Daniel Eggers
executives.background: Daniel Eggers is executive vice president and chief financial officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president of corporate finance for Exelon and was a managing director at Credit Suisse.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Bryan Wright
executives.background: Bryan Wright is senior vice president and chief accounting officer. He previously served as vice president and corporate controller for Exelon.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer

executives.name: David McShea
executives.background: David McShea is executive vice president and general counsel. He previously served as deputy general counsel for Exelon.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

executives.name: Ashish Khandpur
executives.background: President and CEO of Reliance Worldwide Corporation. Former President and CEO of Victaulic and former executive at 3M Company.

executives.name: Daniel Camus
executives.background: Daniel Camus is the former Group CFO and Head of Strategy and International Activities of Electricité de France (EDF). He has significant experience in the global energy sector.

executives.name: James McHugh
executives.background: James McHugh is executive vice president and chief commercial officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of Constellation (Exelon's retail and wholesale business) and has held various leadership roles in trading and portfolio management.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Portfolio Management & Strategy / Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Laurie Brlas
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Newmont Mining Corporation. Former CFO of Cliffs Natural Resources.

executives.name: Robert Lawless
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of McCormick & Company, Inc. He served as Chairman of the Board of McCormick from 1997 to 2009.

executives.name: Yves de Balmann
executives.background: Former Co-Chairman and Co-CEO of Banc of America Securities LLC. Former Vice Chairman of Bankers Trust Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Lawless
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of McCormick & Company, Inc. He has served on the boards of Exelon and Carpenter Technology Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Dominguez
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Constellation Energy Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

board_of_directors.name: Laurie Brlas
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Newmont Mining Corporation. Previously served as CFO of Cliffs Natural Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Yves de Balmann
board_of_directors.background: Former Co-Chairman and Co-CEO of Banc of America Securities LLC. Former director of Exelon.

board_of_directors.name: Ashish Khandpur
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Reliance Worldwide Corporation. Former President and CEO of Victaulic and former executive at 3M Company.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Camus
board_of_directors.background: Daniel Camus is the former Group CFO and Head of Strategy and International Activities of Electricité de France (EDF). He has significant experience in the global energy sector.
